recommendations.title: Marriage Story
recommendations.overview: A stage director and an actress struggle through a grueling, coast-to-coast divorce that pushes them to their personal extremes.

recommendations.title: The Meyerowitz Stories (New and Selected)
recommendations.overview: An estranged family gathers together in New York for an event celebrating the artistic work of their father.

recommendations.title: While We're Young
recommendations.overview: An uptight documentary filmmaker and his wife find their lives loosened up a bit after befriending a free-spirited younger couple.

recommendations.title: Frances Ha
recommendations.overview: An aspiring dancer moves to New York City and becomes caught up in a whirlwind of flighty fair-weather friends, diminishing fortunes and career setbacks.

recommendations.title: The Squid and the Whale
recommendations.overview: Based on the true childhood experiences of Noah Baumbach and his brother, The Squid and the Whale tells the touching story of two young boys dealing with their parents' divorce in Brooklyn in the 1980s.

recommendations.title: Jay Kelly
recommendations.overview: Famous movie actor Jay Kelly embarks on a journey of self-discovery, confronting both his past and present, accompanied by his devoted manager, Ron.

recommendations.title: De Palma
recommendations.overview: An intimate conversation between filmmakers, chronicling De Palma’s 55-year career, his life, and his filmmaking process, with revealing anecdotes and, of course, a wealth of film clips.

recommendations.title: White Noise
recommendations.overview: Jack Gladney, professor of Hitler studies at The-College-on-the-Hill, husband to Babette, and father to four children/stepchildren, is torn asunder by a chemical spill from a rail car that releases an "Airborne Toxic Event" forcing Jack to confront h

recommendations.title: Kicking and Screaming
recommendations.overview: After college graduation, Grover's girlfriend Jane tells him she's moving to Prague to study writing. Grover declines to accompany her, deciding instead to move in with several friends, all of whom can't quite work up the inertia to escape their univ

recommendations.title: Margot at the Wedding
